purpose: This repository contains the Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for Cross River Bank's Lending and Selling platform. It uses Terragrunt to provision and manage AWS cloud resources including databases, APIs, compute resources, and storage services required for loan servicing and selling operations.

apis.purpose: Administrative interface for lending platform management
AI-powered lending decision and analytics API

dataEntities.name: LoanFunding
dataEntities.description: Represents loan funding data in the lending platform

dataEntities.name: DatabaseCredential
dataEntities.description: Represents database access credentials for various services

messagingPatterns.name: SQS Queues for Selling-X
messagingPatterns.description: Message queues for loan selling processes

messagingPatterns.name: Secret Rotation
messagingPatterns.description: Event-driven credential rotation for database access

findings.title: Hardcoded root database access in Lambda functions
findings.description: The secret rotation Lambda functions reference a root secret ARN for database access, creating a potential security risk if compromised. Consider using a more restricted service account or IAM role-based authentication.

findings.title: Direct SQL query construction using f-strings
findings.description: Direct SQL query construction using f-strings in Lambda functions could lead to SQL injection vulnerabilities. While most SQL is properly parameterized, the grant permission statements use f-strings. Switch to parameterized queries for all SQL operations.
